name: 3D Panel

name: ABS

name: Absolute positions
description: Absolute positions Normally, a lineset is printed after the preceding lineset.

name: ADD
description: ADD This statement adds a numeric value to numeric field.

description: ADD_DAYS This function adds number of days to a date.

name: Addline

name: Applications

name: ASC

description: Assignment operator (=) Assigns value(s) to a variable, array or record.

name: Autocomplete

description: Barcode printing Barcode can be printed on laser or inkjet printers in the two ways: using a barcode font or via internal routines.

description: BASE64_ENCODE This function transforms input data to a base64 format.

name: Bitmap Button

description: Close This method closes printer port opened by Open method.

description: Close This method closes XML file opened by Open method.

name: Close
description: Close This method discards any changes, closes document and stops Word.

description: Close This method closes the connection to the FTP server.

description: Close This method closes a file opened by Open method.

name: Constants

description: List methods by object FORM Display Displays text in the caption.

name: Load table definitions from ODBC datasource into the DD
description: Load table definitions from ODBC datasource into the DD To use database tables in your programs, you must load their definitions into the Data Dictionary.

name: LOAD_FILE
description: LOAD_FILE This function loads a file into an alpha field or a long field (LONGVARCHAR or LONGVARBINARY) of an RDB table.

name: Loadexternal
description: Loadexternal This method loads external datasource into Excel worksheet.

name: Local fields definition
description: Local fields definition Local fields are variables defined in a program and can be used in that program only.

name: Local procedures
description: Local procedures / functions definition Local procedure(s)/function(s) are subroutines defined in a program and can be used in this program only, see Global procedure(s)/ function(s) .

name: Logical Name Table Maintenance
description: Logical Name Table Maintenance Logical names table establishes connection between logical name and physical path of a file.

name: Logical operators
description: Logical operators Logical operators let us join two or more conditional expressions .

name: Lookup dialog
description: Lookup dialog /LOOKUP qualifier displays lookup dialog at run-time.

name: LOWER
description: LOWER This function converts an alpha field to lower case.

name: LOWER_NLS
description: LOWER_NLS This function converts all characters in alpha_exp to lower case.

name: LPAD
description: LPAD This function returns an alpha field, left-padded with another string.

name: LTRIM
description: LTRIM This function removes white space from the start of alpha_exp.

name: MAIL
description: MAIL This statement sends a mail.

name: Mailing label format
description: Mailing label format Top margin (mm) The distance from the top edge of the paper to the first label in millimeters.

name: MAKEDATE
description: MAKEDATE This function returns date value calculated from the year, month and day.

name: MAKETIME
description: MAKETIME This function returns time value calculated from the hour, minute and second.

name: Mathematical operators
description: Mathematical operators Mathematical operators are + addition - subtraction, unary minus * multiplication / division ^ exponent For integer division see IDIVIDE , MOD .

name: MAX
description: MAX This function returns the highest of the input values for all processed records between two break fields.

name: Mergeclose
description: Mergeclose This method closes mailmerge data file.

description: Mergedata This method stores one field into the mailmerge record buffer.

name: Mergeopen
description: Mergeopen This method creates new mailmerge data file.

name: Mergewrite

name: MESSAGEBOX

name: Methods
description: Methods Methods are functions that operate on objects.

name: MID
description: MID This function extracts specified number of characters from an alpha field.

name: MIN
description: MIN This function returns the smallest of the input values for all processed records between two break fields.

name: MINUTE
description: MINUTE This function extracts minutes of a time.

name: MOD
description: MOD This function returns remainder from the integer division.

name: Modifyitem
description: Modifyitem This methods modifies text label of a tree item.

name: Modifystring
description: Modify string An identifier is a sequence of English letters, digits, underscore character(_) and dollar sign ($).

name: MONTH
description: MONTH This function returns month of a date.

name: Multiple columns
description: Multiple columns This option applies to 'Detail' lineset only.

name: New program name dialog
description: New program name dialog This dialog appears on the screen if we create new program.

name: NEWGUID
description: NEWGUID This function generates universally unique identifier.

name: NEXT
description: NEXT This statement starts next iteration of immediately innermost loop (DO_WHILE , READ_ALL or SELECT_ALL).

name: NEXT_WORKING_DAY
description: NEXT_WORKING_DAY This function returns next working day.

name: NUM
description: NUM This function converts alpha field to numeric field.

name: NUMBER_OF_ELEMENTS
description: NUMBER_OF_ELEMENTS This function returns number of elements of the array.

name: Numeric Functions
description: Numeric Functions ABS returns absolute value.

name: NUMRECORDS
description: NUMRECORDS This function returns number of records in a file or in an RDB table.

name: Objects with sequence number equal zero
description: Objects with sequence number equal zero Destination field, check box, radio button and combo box with sequence = 0 Processing of these objects is little bit specific regarding to those objects having sequence <> 0.

name: Objvalue
description: Objvalue This method gets value of an object.

name: ON_EVENT_PROCEDURE
description: ON_EVENT_PROCEDURE This statement declares beginning of the event handler.

name: Open
description: Open This method establishes connection to a FTP server.

name: Open
description: Open This method opens/creates a text file.

name: OPEN
description: OPEN This statement opens a file or establishes connection to a database.

name: Open
description: Open This method opens printer port.

name: Open
description: Open This method starts MS Word and opens existing document.

name: Open
description: Open This method starts MS Excel and opens (creates) document.

name: Open
description: Open This method creates an empty XML file and opens it.

name: Opentable
description: Opentable This method opens existing table or creates new one.

name: Options
description: Options Save current work Defines autosave time interval: how often we want the painter to save the program.

name: Pagesetup
description: Pagesetup This method changes some page layout parameters.

name: PAUSE
description: PAUSE This statement pauses a program displaying a message box.

description: PDF417 barcode PDF417 is a two-dimensional bar code consisted of multiple rows.

name: PERFORM
description: PERFORM This statement executes local or global procedure.

name: PREVIOUS

name: PROCEDURE
description: PROCEDURE This statement declares a beginning of a procedure.

name: Program name
description: Program name This is the first dialog of program generator.

name: Program name
description: Program name This is the first dialog of program generator.

name: Program properties
description: Program properties Program, Version, Date created / modified: information only.

name: Program protection
description: Program protection Each Iaf program can be protected from unauthorized access.

name: Program type
description: Program type In this dialog we define program type: report or batch .

name: Progress bar
description: Progress bar To insert new progress bar on the form, click button Progress in toolbox or choose menu command Objects/Progress.

name: Progressbar properties
description: Progressbar properties Object name When the new progress bar is created, generator automatically assigns the name Progress_nnn, where nnn = 1, 2, … Object name can be maximum 30 characters long.

name: QR-barcode
description: QR barcode QR (Quick Response) is a two-dimensional bar code.

name: QUARTER
description: QUARTER This function returns a quarter of a year.

name: Radio button
description: Radio button We can consider radio button as a destination field which stores one of many values: 0 or 1 or 2 or 3, "A" or "B" or "C" or .

name: Radiobutton properties
description: Radiobutton properties Object name When the new radiobutton is created, generator automatically assigns the name Radiobutton_nnn, where nnn = 1, 2, … Object name can be maximum 30 characters long.

name: RDB tables
description: RDB tables Load table definitions from an ODBC datasource into the DD To use database tables in our programs, we have to load their definitions into the DD.

name: READ
description: READ This statement reads one record from a file or RDB table by a key.

name: Read
description: Read This method reads next record from a text file.

name: READ_ALL
description: READ_ALL This statement reads group of records from a file or RDB table in a cycle.

name: READ_EXTERNAL
description: READ_EXTERNAL This statement reads symbol.

description: READ_LE This statement reads a record from an indexed file which key is less than or equal to given key.

name: READ_NEXT

description: Recapitulation record definition Using recapitulation file, we have possibility to print two reports in one program.

name: Record definition
description: Record definition A record consists of fields.

name: Records manipulation
description: Records manipulation The list shows already defined records.

name: Rectangle
description: Rectangle To insert new rectangle on the form, click button Rectangle in toolbox or choose menu command Objects/Rectangle.

name: Rectangle properties
description: Rectangle properties Object name When the new rectangle is created, generator automatically assigns the name Rectangle_nnn, where nnn = 1, 2, … Object name can be maximum 30 characters long.

name: Rename
description: Rename This method renames a file on the connected FTP server.

name: Repeatheader

name: REPLACE
description: REPLACE This function replaces all occurrences of one string by another string.

name: Report parameters
description: Report parameters Paper dimensions Page width Page height Page overflow is the position where the skip to new page occurs.

name: RESET
description: RESET This statement closes, deletes, re-creates and opens empty file.

name: Reset
description: Reset This method truncates the file, i.

name: Rewind
description: Rewind This method repositions file pointer.

name: REWIND
description: REWIND This statement positions on a beginning of a file.

name: RGB
description: RGB This function returns an integer representing RGB color value.

name: RGB color values
description: 65536 * Blue_component + 256 * Green_component + Red_component ------------------------------------------------------------------ where Red, Green, Blue components lays in the range 0 to 255.

name: RIGHT
description: RIGHT This function extracts a substring beginning with the rightmost character in alpha_exp.

name: ROLLBACK
description: ROLLBACK This statement cancels transaction.

name: ROUND
description: ROUND This function rounds a numeric value.

name: RPAD

name: RT_REPLACE
description: RT_REPLACE This function is used to compose a SQL statement at run-time.

name: RTRIM
description: RTRIM This function removes white space from the end of alpha_exp.

name: Run
description: Run This method saves the document, breaks connection between program and MS Excel, and gives control to the user.

name: Run
description: Run This method saves the document, breaks connection between program and MS Word, and gives control to the user.

name: Run-time symbols
description: Run-time symbols Using symbols, the behavior of Iaf programs can be changed at run-time.

name: Runmacro
description: Runmacro This method runs a MS Word macro and, optionally, stores VBA (Visual Basic for Applications) code to Word document.

name: Runmacro
description: Runmacro This method runs an Excel macro, procedure or function and, optionally, stores VBA (Visual Basic for Applications) code to Excel workbook.

name: SAVE_FILE
description: SAVE_FILE This function stores a long field, string, (LONGVARCHAR or LONGVARBINARY, CLOB, BLOB) into a file.

name: Search Data Dictionary
description: Search Data Dictionary We use this dialog to search for string(s) in programs, global procedures/functions and menus.

name: Search global procedures / functions
description: Search global procedures / functions In this dialog you can enter search criteria.

name: SECOND
description: SECOND This function returns seconds of a time.

name: SELECT
description: SELECT This statement retrieves one record (row) from a RDB table.

name: Select datasource
description: Select datasource List List on the left-side of the dialog shows all ODBC datasources defined on your PC, including User DSN and System DSN.

name: Select statement
description: Select statement This is a classic SQL statement used to retrieve rows from a RDB table: [DISTINCT] select_list FROM table(s) [WHERE search_condition] [GROUP BY group_list] [HAVING search_condition] [ORDER BY orderby_list] [UNION SELECT .

name: SELECT_ALL
description: SELECT_ALL This statement retrieves many records (rows) from a RDB table(s) in a cycle.

name: SELECT_START
description: SELECT_START This statement retrieves many records (rows) from a RDB table(s) in a cycle.

name: Selectitem
description: Selectitem This method selects one line in a display-only grid.

name: Setalignment
description: Setalignment This method sets cell alignment (Excel).

name: Setalignment
description: Setalignment This method sets text alignment.

description: Setbackcolor This method sets the background color of a range of Excel cells.

name: Setbackcolor
description: Setbackcolor This method sets the background color of an object or grid cell.

name: Setblinking

name: Setbookmark

name: Setbookmarktext
description: Setbookmarktext This method sets bookmark text (reports only).

name: Setbordercolor
description: Setbordercolor This method sets the border color of an object.

name: Setbordercolor
description: Setbordercolor This method sets the border color of a range of Excel cells.

name: Setcell
description: Setcell This method stores value to an Excel cell.

name: Setcell
description: Setcell This method stores value into cell of previously opened table.

name: Setcellfocus
description: Setcellfocus This method sets the focus to a grid cell.

name: Setcellfont
description: Setcellfont This method changes font attributes of an Excel cell.

name: Setcodepage
description: Setcodepage This method sets code page of an object.

name: Setcodepage
description: Setcodepage This method sets the code page for subsequent "set" methods.

name: Setcolumnwidth

name: Setcolumnwidth
description: Setcolumnwidth This method sets column width in a grid.

name: Setcurrentdirectory

name: Setcurrentline
description: Setcurrentline This method sets current line to line .

name: Setcurrentpage
description: Setcurrentpage This method sets current page in tab control.

name: Setfocus

name: Setfont
description: Setfont This method changes font attributes of an object.

name: Setindent
description: Setindent This method sets new indentation, i.

name: Setlineheight
description: Setlineheight This method sets grid line height.

name: Setnumbercolumns
description: Setnumbercolumns This method sets number of columns in a read-only grid.

name: Setnumberlines
description: Setnumberlines This method sets number of lines in the grid to be displayed in display phase.

name: Setparttextcolor

name: Setpos

description: Setposition This method sets the new position and/or new size of an object.

name: Settextcolor

description: Settextcolor This method sets the text (foreground) color of an object or grid cell.

description: Settopline This method sets the first visible line to line .

name: Show

name: Show Files

name: Show object list
description: Show object list This dialog lists all the objects in the subform or report.

name: Show Records
description: Show Records Record name This is record name filter.

name: SKIP

name: SORT_ARRAY
description: SORT_ARRAY This statement sorts an array.

name: SORT_FILE
description: SORT_FILE This statement sorts a sequential file.

description: Sorttable This method sorts a display-only table (grid) by a column.

description: SOURCE This statement defines fields for display on the screen or on report.

name: Source Field
description: Source Field A source field displays value expression (a variable, formula, function, .

name: Source_field properties
description: Source_field properties Object name When the new source_field is created, generator automatically assigns the name Sourcefield_nnn, where nnn = 1, 2, … Object name can be maximum 30 characters long.

name: Spin
description: Spin Not implemented yet !

description: SPLIT_CSV This function splits an alpha field containing csv string into alpha array.

name: SQRT
description: SQRT This function returns square root of a numeric value.

name: Start
description: Start This method starts the timer or GIF animation.

name: START
description: START This statement positions on a record which is determined by a key.

description: Starting actions This piece of code executes after program initialization and before the first subform is displayed.

name: Statements
description: Statements ADD adds numeric_exp to a numeric field.

name: Stop
description: Stop This method stops the timer or GIF animation .

name: STOP_RUN
description: STOP_RUN This statement stops program.

description: STORED_FUNCTION This function calls a stored function via ODBC.

name: STR_FILL

description: STR_INDEX This function returns the position of the first occurrence of a character in an alphanumeric string.

description: STR_LENGTH This function returns the position of the last non-blank character in an alphanumeric value.

name: STRING
description: STRING This function returns string text.

name: String Functions
description: String Functions ALLTRIM removes white space from both ends of alpha_exp.

name: String operators
description: String operators The only string operator is concatenation .

description: STRING_EDIT This function returns string text, simultaneously replacing placeholders by parameters.

name: Strings
description: Strings Manipulation Enables creating, modifying and deleting the strings.

name: Strings definition
description: Strings definition In this dialog (menu command Define/Strings) we can define strings which will be used in our applications.

name: SUB_MONTHS

name: SUB_SECONDS
description: SUB_SECONDS This function subtracts a number of seconds from a time or datetime field.

name: SUB_WEEKS
description: SUB_WEEKS This function subtracts a number of weeks from a date.

name: SUB_YEARS
description: SUB_YEARS This function subtracts a number of years from a date.

name: Subform
description: Subform A subform is complex object containing many related objects.

name: Subform processing
description: Subform processing The diagram bellow shows how run-time engine processes a subform.

name: Subform properties
description: Subform properties Object name When the new subform is created, generator automatically assigns the name Subform_n , where n = 1, 2, …20.

name: Subforms
description: Subforms Add Adds new subform.

name: SUBSTR_INDEX
description: SUBSTR_INDEX This function returns the position of the first occurrence of a substring.

name: SUM
description: SUM This function returns sum of elements of a numeric array.

name: Sumcol
description: Sumcol This method returns sum of values in a column of a grid.

name: Sumcolif
description: Sumcolif This method returns conditional sum of values in a column of a grid.

description: SUMOBJ This function summarizes values of numeric objects (source field, destination field).

name: Suppress horizontal region
description: Suppress horizontal region Horizontal region is a region within one lineset.

name: Suppress lineset
description: Suppress lineset A lineset is a part of a report: page header, subheader, detail line, subtotal.

name: SYMBOL
description: SYMBOL This function returns value of a symbol.

name: Symbols
description: Symbols Symbols represent one of mechanisms of inter-program communication.

name: Synchronize table definitions
description: Synchronize table definitions This dialog enables you to compare table structures in your Data Dictionary to table structures in the database.

name: Tab control
description: Tab control The tab control is an object consisting of a number of pages that occupy the same space.

name: TABLE
description: TABLE This statement defines the table with which the program is currently working.

name: Table (grid)
description: Table (grid) A table (grid) is most complex object in the painter because the table contains another objects: source field, destination field, check box, combo box or button.

name: Table gradient colors
description: Table gradient colors In this dialog we define gradient style and gradient colors for grid headings.

name: Table modification
description: Table modification This dialog enables you to change table structure just in your Data Dictionary.

name: Table properties
description: Table properties Object name When the new table (grid) is created, generator automatically assigns the name Table_nnn, where nnn = 1, 2, … Object name can be maximum 30 characters long.

name: Tables Manipulation
description: Tables Manipulation The list shows already loaded tables.

name: Text (label)
description: Text (label) To insert new text on the form, click button Text in toolbox or choose menu command Objects/Text.

name: Text properties
description: Text properties Object name When the new static text is created, generator automatically assigns the name Label_nnn, where nnn = 1, 2, … Object name can be maximum 30 characters long.

name: TIME
description: TIME This function converts a value expression to a time field.

name: Time Functions
description: Time Functions ADD_HOURS adds number of hours to a time.

name: Timer
description: Timer The timer is an object enabling a code (procedure) activation when a time period elapses.

name: Timer properties
description: Timer properties Object name When the new timer is created, generator automatically assigns the name Timer_nnn, where nnn = 1, 2, … Object name can be maximum 30 characters long.

name: Toolbar
description: Toolbar The toolbar contains button palette for most frequent commands.

name: Toolbox
description: Toolbox The toolbox contains button palette for object creating .

name: Tooltip text definition
description: Text label · Source field · Destination field · Combo box · Check box · Radio button · Push button · Bitmap button Define tooltip Choose tooltip type (static, dynamic, classic, balloon, super, subform).

name: TOTAL
description: TOTAL This aggregate function returns sum of numeric_exp for all processed records between two breaks .

name: TOTAL_CALC
description: TOTAL_CALC Part of batch calculations which are executed at break, i.

name: TRANSLITER
description: TRANSLITER This function converts a text from Latin script to Cyrillic script and vice versa (Serbian language only).

name: Tree
description: Tree We use a tree to display hierarchical structure of data.

name: TRNLOG
description: TRNLOG This function translates a logical name.

name: TRUNC
description: TRUNC This function truncates a numeric value.

name: Unhidecolumn
description: Unhidecolumn This method displays (shows) hidden columns.

name: UPDATE
description: UPDATE This statement updates existing record of a file (rdb table).

name: UPLOAD
description: UPLOAD This function sends HTTP POST request to an Internet site.

name: Uploadfile
description: Uploadfile This method uploads file to the connected FTP server.

name: UPPER
description: UPPER This function converts an alpha field to upper case.

name: UPPER_NLS
description: UPPER_NLS This function converts all characters in alpha_exp to upper case.

name: Using XML - example
description: Using XML - example Read a database table and store it into the XML file.

name: VALUE
description: VALUE This function converts numeric literal, date, date-time or time field to the numeric value.

name: Value Expression
description: Value Expression Definition 1 A value expression ( value_exp ) is a symbol or string of symbols used to calculate a value.

description: VALUE_DATE This function converts a date literal to date or datetime value.

name: View
description: View Toolbar Toolbox Alignment Status bar These options define visibility status of some parts of the generator.

name: View definition
description: View definition The view determines the way of the records reading in the program cycle (reports and batch programs).

name: WAIT
description: WAIT This statement suspends the program execution for a specified interval (seconds or milliseconds).

name: WARMSG
description: WARMSG This statement displays warning message and continues program execution (moves input focus to the next field according to the sequence number).

name: Watermarks
description: Watermarks printing A watermark is text placed behind report objects.

name: WEEK_OF_YEAR
description: WEEK_OF_YEAR This function returns week of a year.

name: WHENEVER
description: WHENEVER This statement specifies action to be performed when fatal error occurs during the execution of a SQL statement.

name: WINDOW
description: WINDOW This statement transfers control to n-th subform.

name: Write
description: Write This method writes text to the printer port.

name: WRITE
description: WRITE This statement writes record into a file (table).

name: Write
description: Write This method writes one record to a text file.

name: WRITE_AUDIT
description: WRITE_AUDIT This statement writes record in journal file.

name: WRITE_EXTERNAL
description: WRITE_EXTERNAL This statement writes or deletes a symbol.

name: Writeelement

name: Writenode

name: XML

description: XML_GET_FIELD This function reads one field from a XML stream.
